scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,blue "corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/api dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/web dev"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/db build && corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/web build && node scripts/sync-web-dist.mjs
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/shared lint && corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/db lint && corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/api lint && corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/web lint
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/api test && corepack pnpm --filter @ucc/web test
scripts.db:setup: corepack pnpm db:generate && corepack pnpm db:migrate:dev && corepack pnpm db:seed
scripts.supabase:setup: corepack pnpm db:generate && corepack pnpm db:migrate:deploy && corepack pnpm db:seed
